lines.speaker: Narrator
lines.text: Phone notification buzzes. Otto's eyes open. He reaches for his phone.

lines.speaker: Narrator
lines.text: On screen: WESTWARD FC — SELECTED PLAYERS. His thumb scrolls. He stops. His name. OTTO HERRERA.

lines.speaker: Otto
lines.text: I made it. I made it. This feels... this feels so unreal.

lines.speaker: Rebecca
lines.text: What's wrong with you?

lines.speaker: News Anchor
lines.text: Westward FC has officially announced its squad for the upcoming Western League season. Selected players are advised to report to the training center by 10 a.m. today.

lines.speaker: Otto
lines.text: That's me, do you see my name!

lines.speaker: Rebecca
lines.text: That's actually you. You made it?

lines.speaker: Amy
lines.text: You're on TV?

lines.speaker: Elizabeth
lines.text: So it finally happened.

lines.speaker: Rebecca
lines.text: Good. Maybe now we can eat something other than rice and beans.

lines.speaker: Josh
lines.text: Does this mean you're famous?

lines.speaker: Otto
lines.text: No. It just means I have to work even harder.

lines.speaker: Narrator
lines.text: Streets packed. Soldiers everywhere. People funnel toward the training complex.

lines.speaker: Soldier
lines.text: ID.

lines.speaker: Soldier
lines.text: You made it.

lines.speaker: Soldier
lines.text: I was reluctant about you. But congrats. Keep working hard. That's all I can tell you.

lines.speaker: Coach Baker
lines.text: Congratulations. If you're sitting in this room, you made the team.

lines.speaker: Coach Baker
lines.text: I'm not going to lie to you. This team has less depth than last year. Less talent too.

lines.speaker: Coach Baker
lines.text: But if we're disciplined — if we work together — we can avoid last year's mistakes.

lines.speaker: Coach Baker
lines.text: Going far in this league means money. Money means survival. For you. For your families. For Westward.

lines.speaker: Coach Baker
lines.text: You're not just players. You're hope. That's not a small responsibility.

lines.speaker: Coach Baker
lines.text: Report to training tomorrow morning. Be ready.

lines.speaker: Otto
lines.text: Coach... thank you. For picking me.

lines.speaker: Coach Baker
lines.text: Relax.

lines.speaker: Coach Baker
lines.text: You're depth. Very low on the chart.

lines.speaker: Coach Baker
lines.text: You'll need to train harder than everyone else. Maybe you get lucky and see minutes.

lines.speaker: Coach Baker
lines.text: But don't expect much this season.

lines.speaker: Otto
lines.text: I understand. I'm going to give it my best and surprise you.
